arts.ttl: Arsenal dream midfield after Zubimendi transfer with one player moved on
arts.sum: However, after reports surfaced that suggest Arsenal have beaten Liverpool and Real Madrid to reaching an agreement with Martin Zubimendi, it makes more sense than it might initially seem. Arsenal dream midfield with Martin Zubimendi

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand wants to confront Mikel Arteta at North London Derby with one question
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will hope to rejuvenate Arsenal's season at home to Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday following their FA Cup elimination at the hands of Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man United, Tottenham 'miss out' on January target with switch to European giants 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur allegedly suffer a transfer blow, as Juventus agree a deal to sign Paris Saint-Germain's Randal Kolo Muani on loan.

arts.ttl: Player snubs transfer to Tottenham – Not even prepared to take notice of Spurs’ arguments
arts.sum: On Tuesday, L’Equipe reported Tottenham Hotspur have made advances in their efforts to sign Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani. It was also stated Spurs chairman Daniel Levy has held talks with PSG president Nasser Al-Khelaifi. The same newspaper then explained Tottenham made an offer to sign the 26-year-old on loan with an obligation to buy. The post Player snubs transfer to Tottenham – Not even prepared to take notice of Spurs’ arguments appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “Now convinced” – Fabrizio Romano delivers important update on Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has stated that Barcelona are “now convinced” they’ll be keeping defender Ronald Araujo this January despite speculation over his future. The Uruguay international has mostly been a key player for Barca in recent years, but there are also other options in defence and it seems that led to some doubt about his situation. arts.ttl: 'It's done': When Arsenal actually agreed personal terms with Martin Zubimendi with transfer 'very close'
arts.sum: Arsenal appear to be close to securing a major signing for the summer. Indeed, Arsenal are close to signing Martin Zubimendi, and it looks like...

arts.ttl: Granit Xhaka shows true Arsenal colours with three-word message after Gabriel Jesus injury blow
arts.sum: Former Arsenal captain Granit Xhaka has sent his heartfelt best wishes to Gabriel Jesus after the Brazilian suffered an anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury against Manchester United at the weekend. "Wishing you all the best with your recovery, Gabby," the social media post from Arsenal's official account began.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Tottenham North London Derby simulated with six-goal thriller predicted
arts.sum: The second North London Derby of the season takes place later today, with Arsenal and Spurs going head to head in a huge Premier League clash. We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Martinelli, Havertz, Trossard.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available to Mikel Arteta vs Tottenham as injury list grows
arts.sum: As well as the exit from the competition, Mikel Arteta was handed another big blow during the game against Man United, with forward Gabriel Jesus stretchered off. Full-back Riccardo Calafiori remains a slight doubt with the defender facing a race against time to be available.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus' partner breaks silence after huge Arsenal injury blow
arts.sum: We will continue to keep everyone updated with Gabby’s recovery, with everyone at the club fully focused on supporting Gabby to ensure he is back to full fitness as soon as possible." Jesus has now suffered a second serious knee injury since joining Arsenal and is unlikely to feature again until later this year." Gabriel Jesus' partner Raiane Lima has taken to social media following the news the Brazilian suffered an injury to the anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) in his left knee.
